column6:
Dual Technology EV2/ASK:
- Leaf CC EV2 application (IBM custom keyset).
- Standard ASK
- Identical 12 digit ASK ID encoded on both sides of credential.

Report CSN in CSN_4002 format and CSN_5002 format

This configuration was formerly U002. No configuration change, the name was updated to the latest naming structure when they registered their LEAF keyset.


BLE uses AMAG Symmetry Mobile application, it won't work on Symmetry Blue


NOTE: The only difference between CIM1 and CIM2 is CIM2 doesn't read any CSN's. CIM1 is no longer being used going forward (9/30/2021)

column1: JB - 10/20/2021 - Checking old FW it seemed some of the documention was incorrect. Changed the BLE behavior to reflect the configuration old and new. The configuration used to work with Symmetry Blue and report as ETHS. This was updated in the doc. When MyPass was released, the Symmetry Blue as default feature was removed from configurations with Custom Keys. The configuration should work with the AMAG Symmetry Mobile app
